title: Read-Only Paired Apparatus Relay Objective Discovery And Selection Decision
objective: Perform bounded read-only discovery for real paired apparatus/relay objectives and decide whether any objective set survives Packet 082 ownership and Packet 084 abort rules.
decision_summary: Packet 090 selected Branch U for bounded read-only objective discovery, then closed with a truthful defer/no-go result. Discovery did not identify a real paired apparatus/relay objective set. The owned tests contain active assertions for existing apparatus validation/clear behavior and relay search/selection/reset behavior, but no skipped, fixme, failing, TODO, BUG, or broken marker. The owned files import the shared `browser-env` helper read-only; any future objective requiring mutation of that shared helper would be outside the published worker ownership and would abort.

read_only_commands: git grep -n -E "TODO|FIXME|BUG|HACK|XXX|broken|failing|test\\.skip|test\\.fixme|\\.only|throw new Error|console\\.error" -- published apparatus and relay owned files
git grep -n -E "expect\\(|toHave|toBe|toContain|route\\(|fetch\\(|getByRole|getByText|getByLabel" -- published apparatus and relay owned tests
git grep -n -E "from './|from '../|import .* from" -- published apparatus and relay owned files

discovery_findings: No TODO, FIXME, BUG, HACK, XXX, broken, failing, test.skip, test.fixme, .only, throw new Error, or console.error marker was found in the published apparatus/relay owned surfaces.
The apparatus smoke test already asserts invalid UUID guard behavior, clear behavior, and no backend request on invalid input.
The relay smoke test already asserts blank search guard behavior, explicit primary selection, compare selection, clear selection, reset search, and request-count boundaries.
The owned source files import only React plus owned app/lib files and the shared `browser-env` helper through app-local resource libraries.
No real paired apparatus/relay mutation objective was evidenced by repository truth during this read-only discovery.
abort_condition_note: No Packet 082 or Packet 084 abort condition was triggered because no paired objective was selected and no execution opened. A future need to mutate shared `browser-env`, static-surfaces validation, config, package, lockfile, layout, style, runtime, service, install, or old clone would trigger abort rather than widening in place.

workstation_validation.reason: No execution artifact was created, so there was no integrated artifact to validate.

next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 091 - Packet 089 And Packet 090 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
sql_permission_note: This decision packet authorizes no database writes and no source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
